synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2422 Important: Oracle Linux 8 nodejs:20 security update
description:
nodejs
[1:20.20.0-1]
- Update to version 20.20.0
  Resolves: RHEL-130972

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883
